This spell enables you to probe a creature's thoughts. On your turn, you can use an action to make an Intelligence check contested by the creature's Intelligence check; if you succeed, the spell ends.
Teleports you and up to four willing targets up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
Create a trigger and a spoken message that will be uttered when the spell's trigger is met.
This section discusses the various saves a character can make to avoid the effects of spells and other magical abilities.
A bolt of force energy zaps a creature or object you choose within range.
